description_long: This is a young adult female pedestrian with an athletic build, standing with arms extended horizontally. She is dressed in sporty attire, featuring a sleeveless, asymmetrical top and fitted shorts, complemented by knee-high socks and sturdy lace-up shoes. Her right hand is gloved, while her left hand is bare, adding a unique detail to her appearance. The figure's hair is styled in a high ponytail, keeping it neatly away from her face. The overall look suggests she is ready for physical activity or urban recreation. The clothing and accessories are form-fitting and practical, suitable for movement in an urban environment.
description: Athletic young woman in sporty, fitted clothing with a high ponytail and one gloved hand, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view shows the asymmetrical sleeveless top, fitted shorts, knee-high socks, lace-up shoes, and a single glove on the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the high ponytail, the profile of the athletic build, and the glove on the right hand.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back straps of the top, the fit of the shorts, and the ponytail's placement.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the bare left hand and the overall posture.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear with sleeveless asymmetrical top, fitted shorts, knee-high socks, and a single glove
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
